news.headline: Passenger sues American Airlines for negligence after two emergency landings, citing dangerous condition on Boeing plane.
news.summary: Today, a lawsuit was filed against American Airlines in Chicago on Feb. 13, 2025, due to alleged negligence involving a Boeing plane. The passenger, Theresa DeMaria, claimed that the airline forced the aircraft back into service despite a recognized hazardous issue, leading to two emergency landings. The case highlights the importance of ensuring passenger safety, particularly when dealing with known aircraft problems.

news.headline: Ampersand Capital Partners named a Top Growth Equity Firm of 2024 by GrowthCap for life sciences and healthcare sectors.
news.summary: In Boston on February 13, 2025, Ampersand Capital Partners, a prominent private equity company focusing on growth equity investments in life sciences and healthcare, was acknowledged by GrowthCap as one of the Top Growth Equity Firms in 2024. The firm has demonstrated expertise in these sectors and is esteemed for its contributions.

news.headline: Trump will be responsible for any inflation rates over *insert number*.
PAR Technology Corporation will release Q4 & year-end financial results on Feb 28, 2025, at 7:30 am ET, followed by a conference call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) has disclosed that it is set to unveil its fourth quarter and year-end financial results on February 28, 2025. The announcement is scheduled for 7:30 a.m. ET, with an investor presentation and conference call following at 9:00 a.m. ET. The live webcast of the earnings conference call will also be available. Those interested in accessing the webcast can do so by visiting the PAR Technology Investor Relations website at www.partech.com/investor-relations/.

news.headline: Samesurf gains two new cobrowse patents, reaffirms core patent '448 with PTAB. New patents: 12,088,647 and 12,101,361.
news.summary: Samesurf, Inc., a prominent provider of real-time visual engagement technology based in Beverly Hills, California, revealed on February 13, 2025, that they have been granted USPTO patents 12,088,647 and 12,101,361. These patents signify important progress in the field of modern co-browsing.

news.headline: First Tech unveils "First Tech Beyond" program partnering with Portland's four pro sports teams, offering VIP access for members.
news.summary: A groundbreaking initiative has been launched to consolidate sponsorships, providing a unique blend of VIP privileges, exclusive opportunities, and benefits for participants within various organizations. This program encompasses partnerships with Timbers, Thorns, WNBA Portland, Trail Blazers, Hood To Coast Relay, and Oregon International Air Show. The initiative was announced on February 13, 2025, with promising prospects for all involved parties.

Curve Dental integrates Mango Voice AI for call documentation, boosting practice efficiency. ALPHARETTA, Ga., Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: A recent integration of AI technology in Alpharetta, Georgia on February 13, 2025, has brought about automated call documentation. This development aims to boost practice efficiency and upgrade patient communication standards. Curve Dental®, recognized as the primary supplier of comprehensive cloud-based software for dental practice management, spearheaded this initiative.

news.headline: Investors of Newmont are encouraged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP regarding losses between Feb 22, 2024 - Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is advising investors who incurred losses in Newmont to reach out to him for a discussion about their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Newmont within the period of February 22, 2024, to October 23, 2024, and are interested in exploring this further, please contact him directly.

news.headline: US Senate confirms Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of Health and Human Services.
Barletta Boats and Chris-Craft lauded by NMMA at Miami Boat Show for customer satisfaction; Chris-Craft also recognized at Innovation Awards.
news.summary: Chris Craft was recently honored with an honorable mention at the prestigious Innovation Awards. The ceremony recognized outstanding achievements in innovation across various industries, with Chris Craft standing out among the noteworthy mentions. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to pushing the boundaries of innovation and its dedication to excellence. The Innovation Awards highlighted the top innovators in the field, with Chris Craft's recognition further solidifying its position as a leader in the industry. The event showcased a total of X notable companies, making this achievement a significant acknowledgment of Chris Craft's contributions to innovation.

news.headline: Sandvine achieves approval for restructuring on Jan 30, 2025, to emerge from CCAA protection through sale of operations.
news.summary: Sandvine Corporation, based in Plano, Texas, has recently obtained official approval from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List) on January 30, 2025, for its proposed restructuring plan. This approval paves the way for the company to exit the protection provided by the Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act ("CCAA") through a planned sale of its operations. The restructuring will involve transferring its operations to a group of well-funded newly established entities.

news.headline: Mullen Automotive Inc. to undergo 1-for-60 reverse stock split effective Feb. 18, 2025, with new CUSIP number 62526P604.
news.summary: BREA, California - On February 13, 2025, Mullen Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ: MULN), a leading electric vehicle manufacturer, disclosed plans for a 1-for-60 reverse stock split of its common stock, valued at $0.001 per share. This initiative is set to take effect on February 18, 2025, at 12:01 a.m. Eastern Time. The company's common stock will remain listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol MULN and will commence trading on a split-adjusted basis upon the market's opening on the same day. Post the Reverse Stock Split, the new CUSIP number for the Common Stock will be 62526P604.

news.headline: Belgium's loyalty programs market to reach US$1.40 billion by 2029, displaying strong growth and trends in customer retention.
news.summary: A recent report by ResearchAndMarkets.com has highlighted the growth and trends in the Belgium Loyalty Programs Market. The report, titled "Belgium Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics - Q1 2025 Update," offers insights into over 50 key performance indicators related to loyalty programs in the country. With a focus on end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics, the report emphasizes the significance of customer retention in today's business landscape. Belgium's loyalty market is experiencing strong growth and witnessing transformative trends as businesses prioritize retaining customers.

news.headline: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) boosts presence in India with new office near Ahmedabad and Research Center at IIT Madras.
news.summary: Global energy company Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has revealed plans for a significant growth initiative in India. This includes the launch of a new office close to Ahmedabad within Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City) and the establishment of a cutting-edge Research and Innovation Center situated at the Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IITM) Research Park in Chennai. These developments mark an important step in the company's expansion strategy in the region, positioning it to further tap into the Indian market’s potential.

news.headline: Ultimovacs ASA cancels subsequent offering. The release is prohibited in USA, Australia, Canada, or Japan.
news.summary: The information contained in this report is restricted and should not be released, published, or distributed in the United States, Australia, Canada, Japan, or any jurisdiction where such actions would be deemed unlawful.

news.headline: On 13/02/2025, Sanoma Corporation acquired its own shares.
Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) to disclose Q2 earnings, emphasize platformization strategy. CEO optimistic about its impact on security and AI.
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) is scheduled to release its second-quarter earnings post Thursday's market close. Investors are keen on updates regarding the company's transition from a focus on single-product delivery to its "platformization" strategy. CEO Nikesh Arora expressed confidence in this shift following the first-quarter results. He emphasized that the growing market acceptance of platformization as a significant solution for security and improved AI outcomes is a game-changer. Arora predicts this trend will persist for several years, with Palo Alto Networks well-positioned to cater to customer needs. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ukraine's Foreign Minister: I had my first call with US counterpart.
IT firm SDI Presence partners with Hexagon to promote public safety platform across emergency services in Chicago.
news.summary: A leading IT services firm, SDI Presence LLC (SDI), has revealed a strategic partnership on February 13, 2025, in Chicago to promote the implementation of Hexagon's public safety platform within emergency services. SDI specializes in overseeing critical infrastructure and systems and aims to support the adoption of Hexagon's platform across this sector. The collaboration signals a significant effort to enhance the technological capabilities within emergency services, potentially impacting a significant number of organizations and individuals reliant on such systems.

news.headline: Bitcoin faces US PPI impact with warnings of lower position; crypto struggles in market.
news.summary: In recent statistics, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases in the United States has surpassed 30 million, with over 550,000 deaths recorded. This surge in cases has prompted a nationwide effort to increase vaccine distribution and administration. Additionally, the global death toll from the pandemic has now reached over 2.5 million. Governments and health authorities continue to emphasize the importance of following safety measures such as wearing masks, social distancing, and getting vaccinated to slow the spread of the virus and save lives.

news.headline: Wall Street banks optimistic about Trump's deregulation agenda. Analyst notes positive outlook from 30+ banks at the Bank of America conference. Looser regulations could lead to increased growth opportunities. Trade war concerns remain.
news.summary: Wall Street banks appear undeterred by the administration’s tariff policy, as per Bank of America analyst Ebrahim H. Poonawala. Poonawala highlighted the optimism among Wall Street banks at the recent Bank of America financial services conference. Executives from more than 30 banks shared the sentiment that relaxed regulations would allow financial teams to focus on growth opportunities rather than compliance issues. The insight was gathered from discussions at BofA’s 33rd annual financial services conference. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Monotype releases 2025 Type Trends Report focusing on global trends such as AI, regional conflict, generational divides, climate change.
news.summary: Examining the impact of global trends like AI, regional conflict, generational differences, and climate change on creativity, and how they in turn influence creativity. Discussing the transformative influence of design in a dynamic world. Monotype Imaging Inc. in WOBURN, Mass., on Feb. 13, 2025, delves into this topic.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigating claims on behalf of Neumora Therapeutics investors. Contact them if you suffered losses.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who faced losses in Neumora to reach out to him directly to explore their next steps. If you bought or obtained securities in Neumora linked to the registration statement and have suffered losses, it is recommended to discuss your options with Wilson.

news.headline: Validic launches AI-powered remote patient monitoring tool using Generative AI, aiding healthcare providers to analyze patient data trends.
news.summary: A healthcare technology innovation company, Validic, based in Durham, North Carolina, has introduced a new patent-pending solution: a digital remote patient monitoring (RPM) assistant that utilizes Generative AI (GenAI) technology. This advanced feature, integrated into Validic Impact™, their award-winning RPM solution compatible with Electronic Health Records (EHR), enables healthcare providers to efficiently analyze and summarize patient data trends. The cutting-edge technology aims to enhance healthcare providers' understanding of patient health, improving the quality of care delivered.

news.headline: Gabelli Equity Trust reaffirms 10% distribution policy, declares $0.15/share distribution for Q1 2025 on March 24.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Equity Trust Inc.'s Board of Directors announced a $0.15 per share cash distribution to common stock shareholders. This distribution aligns with the Fund's 10% distribution policy and will be paid on March 24, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 17, 2025. The Fund is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GAB.

news.headline: ClearGain Capital launches new business brokering services in Miami aimed at small & medium business owners in North America. Established in 2024.
news.summary: In Miami on February 13, 2025, ClearGain Capital was introduced as an innovative business lending platform aiming to support small and medium business owners across North America with a range of financing solutions. Founded in 2024, ClearGain Capital is dedicated to providing assistance to entrepreneurs seeking to grow their businesses.

news.headline: Arab Palestinian Investment Co. reported $9 million net profits in 2024, with total revenues reaching...
news.summary: In an announcement from RAMALLAH, Palestine on February 13, 2025, the Arab Palestinian Investment Company released its consolidated preliminary (unaudited) financial report for the year 2024. Tarek Aggad, the company's Chairman and CEO, revealed that the total revenues for the company in 2024 amounted to a substantial amount.

news.headline: The GDL Fund (NYSE: GDL) declares $0.12 per share cash distribution for Q1 2025, payable on March 24 to shareholders of record on March 17.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Rye, New York, the Board of Trustees of The GDL Fund (NYSE:GDL) announced a cash distribution of $0.12 per share. The distribution will be payable on March 24, 2025, to common shareholders who are recorded as such on March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Monetate names Steve Maher as new CEO to drive AI innovation and global expansion. Targeting AI solutions in search and merchandising.
news.summary: Monetate, a prominent personalization platform facilitating digital connections between ecommerce brands and customers worldwide, has named Steve Maher as the new Chief Executive Officer in Dallas. Maher, a seasoned expert in expanding AI-enhanced customer experience platforms, has joined Monetate as it moves towards offering AI-powered search, discovery, and dynamic merchandising solutions. Maher brings over two decades of experience to the team.

RFK Jr. has enough votes to be confirmed as HHS Secretary.
TikTok CEO plans more streamlining as talks with Trump team continue - The Information.
Brian Quintenz, former CFTC Commissioner, returns to top position after time at a16z, signaling crypto-friendly change.
news.summary: Brian Quintenz, a former CFTC Commissioner, will be resuming his position at the top after working at a16z. This move is expected to lead to more favorable regulation for the crypto industry.

news.headline: Steven Tom appointed Senior VP of Data Science & Insights at Blend, to amplify impact with generative AI solutions.
news.summary: In New York on February 13, 2025, Blend revealed the selection of Steven Tom as the Senior Vice President for Data Science & Insights (BI) P&L. This appointment is a strategic move aimed at enhancing their influence across various sectors by introducing innovative generative AI solutions. Through this new role, Steven will play a crucial part in driving the company's mission forward.

news.headline: Quarterra Multifamily set to welcome first move-ins at Hawkins: San Francisco's newest apartment complex on Treasure Island with 178 homes.
news.summary: A new mid-rise community in San Francisco comprising 178 homes is currently accepting lease applications. The first residents are scheduled to move in by February 2025. Quarterra Multifamily, a part of Lennar Corporation, is overseeing the development of this community.

news.headline: Jamie Glass promoted to Chief Compliance Officer, Managing Director of Operations at HWP Group to enhance compliance in healthcare & pharmaceuticals.
news.summary: In Upper Saddle River, New Jersey, on February 13, 2025, the HWP Group announced the promotion of Jamie Glass to the position of Chief Compliance Officer and Managing Director of Operations. This move signifies the company's recognition of the necessity for a designated leader in ensuring adherence to regulations in the healthcare and pharmaceutical sectors. Jamie Glass will be responsible for overseeing compliance efforts within the company, responding to the stringent requirements of the industry.

news.headline: Epicured Inc. named to 2025 New York Digital Health 100 list by DHNY, marking third consecutive year.
news.summary: Epicured Inc. has been honored with a place on the 2025 New York Digital Health 100 (DH100) list for the third consecutive year, distinguishing the company as a key player in driving healthcare innovation in New York. The DH100 recognizes top companies contributing to making New York a hub of healthcare advancement. This acknowledgment solidifies Epicured Inc.'s position as a prominent leader in the field.

news.headline: Kellogg School of Management receives $25M gift to establish Northwestern Innovation Institute.
news.summary: Northwestern University trustee Pin Ni and the Future Wanxiang Foundation have generously donated funds to establish a new research institute in Evanston, Illinois. This institute will focus on evaluating the potential effects of innovation. The announcement was made on February 13, 2025. The institute will be affiliated with Northwestern University and the Kellogg School of Management. This gift highlights a commitment to advancing research and understanding the impact of innovation.

news.headline: Robinhood (HOOD) reported a 115% revenue boost in Q4 2024, fueled by crypto trading and expansions.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Robinhood experienced notable expansion, seeing a remarkable 115% increase in revenues compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily fueled by a substantial rise in cryptocurrency trading activities and strategic business expansions.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $268.5 mln.
Map Your Show launches MYS Insights to aid trade show organizers with revenue tracking, predicting, and exhibitor retention. #Cincinnati #PRnewswire #MYS #analytics #eventperformance
news.summary: In Cincinnati on February 13, 2025, Map Your Show (MYS) introduced MYS Insights, a robust analytics tool aimed at aiding trade show organizers in monitoring and forecasting revenue, pinpointing exhibitors at risk, and enhancing event outcomes. The launch of MYS Insights signifies a significant step forward for Map Your Show in providing valuable insights for event planning and management.

news.headline: Blaqclouds, Inc. appoints 3 new board members for leadership and innovation.
news.summary: Blaqclouds, Inc. recently appointed three new board members in a strategic move to enhance leadership and drive innovation within the company. The additions bring the total number of board members to 12, with the new appointees joining existing members to guide the company's direction. This decision underscores the company's commitment to forward-thinking strategies and ensuring diverse perspectives. With the new appointments, Blaqclouds, Inc. demonstrates its focus on leveraging expertise and experience to propel growth and success in its operations.

news.headline: Illinois Mutual certified as Great Place To Work for 5th year in a row, highlighting commitment to workplace culture.
news.summary: Illinois Mutual Life Insurance Company based in Peoria, IL, has recently been recognized for the fifth year in a row as a Great Place To Work®. This significant achievement highlights the company's dedication to maintaining a positive workplace environment. The company continues to prioritize creating a culture that values and supports its employees.

news.headline: Lead-Acid Battery Market in Southeast Asia to Grow by USD 1.3 Billion from 2025-2029, driven by automotive sector, CAGR of 6.8%. AI-driven market evolution report - Technavio
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been highlighted how artificial intelligence is playing a crucial role in transforming the market landscape. Specifically, the lead-acid battery market in Southeast Asia is projected to witness substantial growth, with an expected increase of USD 1.3 billion anticipated between 2025 and 2029. This growth is predicted to advance at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 6.8% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: AMD's stock at risk due to unrelated factor; remains uncertain amid rising speculation.
Stanford University partners with Starkey for new study validating balance assessment for fall risk detection, published in Otology & Neurotology.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, on February 13, 2025, Starkey maintains its leading position in technology and innovation, emphasizing partnerships with researchers worldwide. A study published in Otology & Neurotology underscores this commitment.
